options.emptyDescription: Options will appear here once they are created.
options.deleteDescription: This option will be removed from the service. This action cannot be undone.
options.deleteBlockedDescription: {{option}} cannot be deleted because it has dependent {{dependencies}}.

tooltips.contractStatusDescription: Once activated, the contract cannot be deactivated.
tooltips.commissionLockedActions: Past date commissions cannot be edited or deleted
tooltips.marginRuleEditDisabled: Edit option is not available for past dates.
tooltips.marginRuleDeleteDisabled: Delete option is only available for future dates
tooltips.promotionConditionsInfoDescription: All conditions apply only to services of type Accommodation.

paxTypesInfo.rule1: PaxTypes are non-deletable once referenced (if this contract uses this PaxType in Eligibility or Rate Plans)
paxTypesInfo.rule2: PaxType can be deactivated (all except for ADT) if no references by ACTIVE downstream configuration (e.g., Contracted Eligibility, Contracted Rate Plans, Contracted Conditions)
paxTypesInfo.rule3: Reactivation is allowed. User is responsible to ensure correct downstream setup after reactivation (ContractedEligibility, ContractedRatePlans). System does not auto-repair or auto-relink downstream configurations.

adultPax.title: Adult PAX
adultPax.description: The Adult PAX type is active by default and read-only. It cannot be modified or disabled.

tooltips.xeroIdRequiredToActivateSupplierBody: This supplier can be activated only if a Xero ID is provided.
tooltips.xeroIdRequiredToActivateAgencyBody: Xero ID is required to activate.

sections.commissionDescription: Create, view and manage all commissions for this Agency.
sections.agentsDescription: Agents can be created now or later in the Agents section and linked to this agency.
sections.headOfficeSuppliersDescription: Suppliers created under this Head Office will appear here.
sections.promotionsDescription: Create and manage promotions to apply special offers, discounts, or benefits to selected services and date ranges.
sections.contractsDescription: Add a new contract to this supplier.
sections.bestForDescription: Use tags to categorize service based on travel style or customer preferences.
sections.financeDescription: Finance codes are read-only and maintained by the system. They cannot be edited or modified.
sections.extrasDescription: View and manage all extra products or services here.
sections.extrasServiceDescription: All extras created under this supplier and linked to this service are listed here.
sections.addServiceDescription: Add a new service to this supplier.
sections.optionsDescription: View and manage all options of this service.
sections.eligibilityDescription: View and manage eligibility restrictions for the service.
sections.ratePlanDescription: View and manage all rate plans for the service.
sections.agencyGroupAgenciesDescription: This is the list of agencies assigned to this agency group.

labels.name: Name
labels.futureUpliftInfoBody: Used when no contracted rate is available for a future travel date. The system applies this uplift to the latest available rate to generate pricing. If multiple future years are missing, the uplift is applied as a compound percentage year over year.
labels.bookingWindowRelativeDescription: Define the relative booking window by selecting a range of days before travel.
labels.bookingWindowDescription: Define the booking window by selecting specific dates or a range of days before travel.
labels.title: Title

validation.timeFromTimeToPair: Enter both Time from and Time to, or leave both empty.
validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
validation.latitude: Latitude must be a number between -90 and 90
validation.longitude: Longitude must be a number between -180 and 180
validation.agentZoneIdRequired: AgentZone ID is required when visible in AgentZone
validation.whiteLabelNoteRequired: White labeling note is required when white labeling is required
validation.noteRequiredWhenCreditTerms: Note is required when credit terms apply
validation.nameMaxLength: Name must be at most {{max}} characters
validation.emailMaxLength: Email must be at most {{max}} characters
validation.descriptionMaxLength: Group description must be at most {{max}} characters
validation.validToMustBeAfterValidFrom: Valid To must be on or after Valid From
validation.supplierPaxActiveAgeRangeRequired: Age range is required for active Pax Types.
validation.supplierPaxAgeFromLessThanTo: Age From must be less than Age To.
validation.supplierPaxRangesMustNotOverlap: Age ranges must not overlap across active Pax Types.
validation.supplierPaxAdultMustCoverHighestAgeBound: Adult must cover the highest age boundary.
validation.supplierPaxEndDateMustBeOnOrAfterStart: End date must be on or after start date.
validation.supplierPaxReferencedByDownstream: This Pax Type is referenced by active Eligibility or Rate Plans.
validation.invalidPhone: Enter a valid international number, e.g. +254 712 345 678
validation.phoneNumericOnly: Phone must contain only numbers and valid separators (e.g. + - ( ) ).
validation.postalCodeNumericOnly: Postal code must contain only numbers.
validation.paxTypeAgeRequired: {{type}}: Age From and Age To are required when active.
validation.paxTypeAgeFromLessThanTo: {{type}}: Age From must be less than Age To.
validation.paxTypeAgeGap: {{type1}} Age To + 1 must equal {{type2}} Age From (expected {{expected}}).
validation.paxTypeAnyExclusive: Pax type “ANY” cannot be combined with specific pax types for the same travel date range.
validation.travelDateFromBeforeTo: From date must be on or before To date.
validation.bookingWindowFromBeforeTo: Booking window start must be before end date.
validation.bookingWindowFromBeforeTravel: Booking window start must be before all travel date ranges.
validation.bookingWindowToBeforeTravelOrWithin: Booking window end must be before travel starts or fall within a travel date range (not after its end).
validation.relativeBookingWindowNeedsTravelStart: Add at least one travel date range with a start date before saving a relative booking window (days before travel).
validation.travelDatesOutsideContract: Travel dates must be within contract validity period.
validation.serviceRequiredWhenNotSupplier: Service is required for service scope.
validation.mustBeValidEmail: Must be a valid email address
validation.selectAtLeastOneOperatingDay: Select at least one operating day.
validation.optionTitleUnique: Option name must be unique within this service.
validation.agencyMustHaveAtLeastOneGroup: {{name}} must belong to at least one agency group.
validation.creditTermsNoteRequired: Credit notes are required when credit terms are enabled
validation.dateMustBeBeforeOrEqual: Date must be before or equal to {{field}}
validation.dateMustBeAfterOrEqual: Date must be after or equal to {{field}}
validation.atLeastOnePaymentTerm: At least 1 payment term is required
validation.selectCountryFromList: Please select a country from the list
validation.selectLocationFromList: Please select a location from the list
validation.refundablePolicyConditionRequired: A refundable policy must include at least one condition defining the terms under which a refund applies.
validation.atLeastOneTravelDate: At least one travel date is required
validation.atLeastOneContractedRate: At least one contracted rate is required
validation.promotionNoteRequired: Note is required when partially supported is enabled
validation.promotionDateRangeOrder: From date must be before To date.
validation.promotionTravelDatesOverlap: Travel date ranges must not overlap.
validation.promotionBookingWindowWithinTravelDates: Booking window end must be on or before the latest travel date end.
validation.promotionPositiveInteger: Value must be a positive integer.
validation.promotionRelativeRangeOrder: Relative booking window end must be greater than or equal to the start.
validation.promotionAtLeastOneCondition: At least one condition is required.
validation.promotionSupplierNightsConditionRequired: At least one Supplier Nights condition is required.
validation.promotionSupplierMustBelongToHeadOffice: Selected supplier must belong to this Head Office.
validation.promotionSupplierNightsExceedSuppliers: Supplier Nights conditions cannot exceed the number of suppliers under this Head Office.
validation.promotionSupplierNightsMinRequired: Supplier nights requires at least a min value.
validation.promotionDuplicatePaxCondition: This pax type is already used for the selected condition type.
validation.promotionAtLeastOneAction: At least one action is required.
validation.promotionDuplicateActionType: Only one action of this type can be added.
validation.promotionDiscountTargetsRequired: At least one discount target is required.
validation.promotionIndexRangeOrder: Index To must be greater than or equal to Index From.
validation.maxMustBeGreaterThanMin: Max must be greater than min
validation.postalCodeMinLength: Postal code must be at least {{min}} characters
validation.postalCodeMaxLength: Postal code must be at most {{max}} characters

modals.createServiceDescription: Newly created service will be active by default.

pages.agencyGroupsDescription: Organize agencies into groups to manage them collectively and apply shared settings or rules.
pages.agentsDescription: View and manage all agents on the platform. Agents can be assigned to agencies and managed individually. Newly created agents are active by default.
pages.agenciesDescription: Manage all partner agencies that work with your platform. Each agency can have multiple agents and its own settings. Newly created agencies are active by default.
pages.suppliersDescription: View and manage all suppliers that provide services or products through your platform.
pages.documentsDescription: This is the Documents page placeholder.
pages.logDescription: This is the Log page placeholder.
pages.contentDescription: View and manage all global content blocks and document templates here.

pages.rateTypesDescription: This is the Rate Types page placeholder.
pages.sourceMarketDescription: This is the Source Market page placeholder.
pages.marginRulesDescription: View and manage all margin rules applied to pricing and calculations.

and bookings.
